items.title: 甲骨文的股价大幅上涨。以下是它如何最终摆脱了人工智能的处罚。

items.title: Atlassian 削减员工10%，用于“自筹资金”在人工智能和企业销售方面的投资。
items.summary: Atlassian 表示将裁员 10%，约 1,600 个职位，旨在为人工智能和企业销售投资提供资金。

items.summary_en: Atlassian said it's cutting 10% of its workforce, or about 1,600 jobs, as it restructures to fund investments in artificial intelligence and enterprise sales.
